items.objective: Initialize KB and run baseline health checks.
items.expected: KB healthy status and doctor PASS.

items.objective: Run chaos in KB-only mode and scan mode.
items.expected: Score returned in both modes; scan confidence upgraded in scan-src run.

items.objective: Validate estimate risk band and JSON output.
items.expected: Estimate list includes risk bands; JSON output remains schema-consistent.

items.objective: Scoped agent boundary test for WordPress KB agent.
steps: Create scoped agent with applyTo sample_repo/wordpress/**
items.expected: Agent refuses or flags out-of-scope operation per immutable rules.

items.objective: Multi-agent handoff simulation with KBRoot coordinator.
items.expected: No cross-scope edits; consolidated report generated.
